details: The agent failed to use the Wikipedia search functionality as required. After encountering errors with the search box interaction (fill and click commands returned DOM errors), the agent bypassed the search entirely and directly navigated to the Turing Award page via URL (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turing_Award). The known facts explicitly state the agent must have used the Wikipedia search functionality. While the final answer (Alan Perlis, 1966) is correct, the required search step was not completed.
